Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(***********************************************************************************

 Duality involutions of bicategories

 In this file, we define the notion of duality involutions. Duality involutions
 generalize the opposite category. More specifically, we have a pseudofunctor going
 from `Cat^co` to `Cat` sending every category `C` to its opposite category. Since
 taking the opposite twice gives the identity of categories, this pseudofunctor is
 actually a biequivalence. For categories enriched over a symmetric monoidal
 category, we also have an opposite category construction which satisfies similar
 properties.

 The data of a duality involution consists of:
 - A pseudonatural equivalence, which is the unit of the biequivalence. This is
   formalized by two pseudonatural transformations and two invertible modifcation.
   This gives rise to an adjoint equivalence in the category of pseudofunctors, which
   is shown in [left_adjoint_equivalance_duality_unit].
 - An invertible modification that witnesses the triangle equality.
 The laws of a duality involution witness the so-called swallowtail equations for
 biadjunctions.

 Our definition of duality involutions is slightly different compared to the
 literature. Usually, one would express the triangle law via an invertible
 modification (see [duality_triangle_modification]). However, the naturality
 condition of this modification is rather complicated: it is filled with
 several associators and unitors ([is_modification_duality_triangle_lem]). Instead
 we give a simplified version of this naturality condition ([duality_triangle_law]).
 This condition is easier to use and easier to prove, and it is strong enough to
 deduce that the triangle law actually is an invertible modification, which we prove
 in the statement [duality_triangle_modification]).

 References
 - Michael Shulman, Contravariance through Enrichment
   Definition 2.1
   https://arxiv.org/pdf/1606.05058

 Contents
 1. Data of duality involutions
 2. Counit of duality involution
 3. Laws of duality involutions
 4. Duality involutions
 5. Accessors for the laws of duality involutions

 ***********************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.UnivalenceOp.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.OpCellBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Identity.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Composition.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Op2OfPseudoFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.PseudoTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.Examples.Unitality.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.Examples.Associativity.

Notation "_ ◅ _" was already used.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Modifications.Modification.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * 1. Data of duality involutions *)
Section DualityInvolutionData.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (L : psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B).

  Let R : psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
    := op2_psfunctor L.

  Definition duality_involution_data
    : UU
    := ∑ (η : pstrans
                (id_psfunctor B)
                (comp_psfunctor L R))
         (ηinv : pstrans
                   (comp_psfunctor L R)
                   (id_psfunctor B)),
       (invertible_modification
          (id₁ _)
          (η · ηinv))
       ×
       (invertible_modification
          (ηinv · η)
          (id₁ _))
       ×
       (∏ (x : op2_bicat B),
        invertible_2cell
          (η (L x))
          (#L (η x))).

  Definition make_duality_involution_data
             (η : pstrans
                    (id_psfunctor B)
                    (comp_psfunctor L R))
             (ηinv : pstrans
                       (comp_psfunctor L R)
                       (id_psfunctor B))
             (m₁ : invertible_modification
                     (id₁ _)
                     (η · ηinv))
             (m₂ : invertible_modification
                     (ηinv · η)
                     (id₁ _))
             (t : ∏ (x : op2_bicat B),
                  invertible_2cell
                    (η (L x))
                    (#L (η x)))
    : duality_involution_data
    := η ,, ηinv ,, m₁ ,, m₂ ,, t.
End DualityInvolutionData.

Section Projections.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {L : psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B}
          (d : duality_involution_data L).

  Let R : psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
    := op2_psfunctor L.

  Definition unit_of_duality
    : pstrans
        (id_psfunctor B)
        (comp_psfunctor L R)
    := pr1 d.

  Let η := unit_of_duality.

  Definition unit_inv_of_duality
    : pstrans
        (comp_psfunctor L R)
        (id_psfunctor B)
    := pr12 d.

  Let ηinv := unit_inv_of_duality.

  Definition unit_unit_inv_of_duality
    : invertible_modification
        (id₁ _)
        (η · ηinv)
    := pr122 d.

  Definition unit_inv_unit_of_duality
    : invertible_modification
          (ηinv · η)
          (id₁ _)
    := pr1 (pr222 d).

  Definition triangle_data_of_duality
             (x : op2_bicat B)
    : invertible_2cell
        (η (L x))
        (#L (η x))
    := pr2 (pr222 d) x.

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
invertible_2cell (ηinv (L x)) (# L (ηinv x))

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
invertible_2cell (ηinv (L x)) (# L (ηinv x))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
invertible_2cell
  (ηinv (L x) · id₁ (id_psfunctor B (L x)))
  (# L (ηinv x))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
invertible_2cell (ηinv (L x) · # L (id₁ x))
  (# L (ηinv x))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
invertible_2cell (ηinv (L x) · # L (id₁ x))
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L R (L x)) · # L (ηinv x))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
invertible_2cell (ηinv (L x) · # L (id₁ x))
  ((ηinv · η) (L x) · # L (ηinv x))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
invertible_2cell (ηinv (L x) · # L (id₁ x))
  ((pr111 ηinv) (L x)
   · ((pr111 η) (L x) · # L (ηinv x)))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
invertible_2cell (# L (id₁ x))
  ((pr111 η) (L x) · # L (ηinv x))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
invertible_2cell (# L (id₁ x))
  (# L (η x) · # L (ηinv x))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
invertible_2cell (# L (id₁ x)) (# L (η x · ηinv x))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
invertible_2cell (id₁ x) (η x · ηinv x)

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
id₁ x ==> η x · ηinv x
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
is_invertible_2cell ?η

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
id₁ x ==> η x · ηinv x
 exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell
               (invertible_modcomponent_of unit_unit_inv_of_duality x)).
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
is_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (invertible_modcomponent_of
        unit_unit_inv_of_duality x))
 
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality: pstrans (id_psfunctor B) (comp_psfunctor L R)
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L R) (id_psfunctor B)
x: op2_bicat B
is_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (invertible_modcomponent_of
        unit_unit_inv_of_duality x))

      apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.
End Projections.

(** * 2. Counit of duality involution *)
Section CounitFromDualityInvolution.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {L : psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B}
          (d : duality_involution_data L).

  Let R : psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
    := op2_psfunctor L.

  Let η := unit_of_duality d.
  Let ηinv := unit_inv_of_duality d.
  Let ηηinv := unit_unit_inv_of_duality d.
  Let ηinvη := unit_inv_unit_of_duality d.
  Let t := triangle_data_of_duality d.

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
left_adjoint_equivalence η

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
left_adjoint_equivalence η

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
left_equivalence (pr1 d)

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
psfunctor_bicat B B
⟦ comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L), id_psfunctor B ⟧
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
id₁ (id_psfunctor B) ==> pr1 d · ?pr1
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
(λ _ : id₁ (id_psfunctor B) ==> pr1 d · ?pr1,
 ?pr1 · pr1 d ==>
 id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))) 
  ?pr10
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))) 
  ?pr11

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
psfunctor_bicat B B
⟦ comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L), id_psfunctor B ⟧
 exact ηinv.
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
id₁ (id_psfunctor B) ==> pr1 d · ηinv
 exact (pr1 ηηinv).
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
(λ _ : id₁ (id_psfunctor B) ==> pr1 d · ηinv,
 ηinv · pr1 d ==>
 id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))) (pr1 ηηinv)
 exact (pr1 ηinvη).
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit (ηinv,, pr1 ηηinv,, pr1 ηinvη))
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (ηinv,, pr1 ηηinv,, pr1 ηinvη)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (ηinv,, pr1 ηηinv,, pr1 ηinvη)))
  ηηinv
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  Definition left_adjoint_equivalance_duality_unit_pointwise
             (x : B)
    : left_adjoint_equivalence (η x)
    := pointwise_adjequiv _ left_adjoint_equivalance_duality_unit x.

  Definition left_adjoint_equivalance_duality_unit_inv
    : left_adjoint_equivalence ηinv
    := inv_left_adjoint_equivalence left_adjoint_equivalance_duality_unit.

  Definition left_adjoint_equivalance_duality_unit_inv_pointwise
             (x : B)
    : left_adjoint_equivalence (ηinv x)
    := pointwise_adjequiv _ left_adjoint_equivalance_duality_unit_inv x.

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
pstrans_data (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))

invertible_2cell
  (?η₁ X · # (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor R L) f · ?η₁ Y)

B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
∏ (X Y : op2_bicat B) (f : op2_bicat B ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  ((λ x : op2_bicat B, ηinv x : B ⟦ L (L x), x ⟧) X
   · # (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor R L) f
   · (λ x : op2_bicat B, ηinv x : B ⟦ L (L x), x ⟧) Y)
 
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell (ηinv x · f) (# L (# L f) · ηinv y)

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell (# L (# L f) · ηinv y) (ηinv x · f)

      exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell (psnaturality_of ηinv f)).
  Defined.

d: duality_involution_data L

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
∏ (X Y : op2_bicat B) (f g : op2_bicat B ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(α : f ==> g),
(pr1 duality_counit_data X
 ◃ ## (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) α)
• pr2 duality_counit_data X Y g =
pr2 duality_counit_data X Y f
• (## (comp_psfunctor R L) α
   ▹ pr1 duality_counit_data Y)
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
∏ X : op2_bicat B,
(pr1 duality_counit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) X)
• pr2 duality_counit_data X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 duality_counit_data X)
 • linvunitor (pr1 duality_counit_data X))
• (psfunctor_id (comp_psfunctor R L) X
   ▹ pr1 duality_counit_data X)
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
∏ (X Y Z : op2_bicat B) (f : op2_bicat B ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(g : op2_bicat B ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 duality_counit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f g)
• pr2 duality_counit_data X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator (pr1 duality_counit_data X)
      (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f)
      (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) g)
    • (pr2 duality_counit_data X Y f
       ▹ # (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) g))
   • rassociator (# (comp_psfunctor R L) f)
       (pr1 duality_counit_data Y)
       (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) g))
  • (# (comp_psfunctor R L) f
     ◃ pr2 duality_counit_data Y Z g))
 • lassociator (# (comp_psfunctor R L) f)
     (# (comp_psfunctor R L) g)
     (pr1 duality_counit_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp (comp_psfunctor R L) f g
   ▹ pr1 duality_counit_data Z)

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
∏ (X Y : op2_bicat B) (f g : op2_bicat B ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(α : f ==> g),
(pr1 duality_counit_data X
 ◃ ## (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) α)
• pr2 duality_counit_data X Y g =
pr2 duality_counit_data X Y f
• (## (comp_psfunctor R L) α
   ▹ pr1 duality_counit_data Y)
 
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y: op2_bicat B
f, g: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
(psnaturality_of ηinv g) ^-1 • (ηinv x ◃ α) =
(## L (## L α) ▹ ηinv y)
• (psnaturality_of ηinv f) ^-1

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y: op2_bicat B
f, g: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
ηinv x ◃ α =
(is_invertible_2cell_inv (psnaturality_of ηinv g)) ^-1
• ((## L (## L α) ▹ ηinv y)
   • (psnaturality_of ηinv f) ^-1)

 ^-1 • (## L (## L α) ▹ ηinv y))
• (psnaturality_of ηinv f) ^-1

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))

invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y: op2_bicat B
f, g: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
(ηinv x ◃ α)
• (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psnaturality_of ηinv f))
  ^-1 =
(is_invertible_2cell_inv (psnaturality_of ηinv g)) ^-1
• (## L (## L α) ▹ ηinv y)

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y: op2_bicat B
f, g: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
(ηinv x ◃ α) • psnaturality_of ηinv f =
psnaturality_of ηinv g • (## L (## L α) ▹ ηinv y)

      exact (psnaturality_natural ηinv _ _ _ _ α).
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
∏ X : op2_bicat B,
(pr1 duality_counit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) X)
• pr2 duality_counit_data X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 duality_counit_data X)
 • linvunitor (pr1 duality_counit_data X))
• (psfunctor_id (comp_psfunctor R L) X
   ▹ pr1 duality_counit_data X)
 
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x: op2_bicat B
(psnaturality_of ηinv (id₁ x)) ^-1
• (ηinv x ◃ id₂ (id₁ x)) =
((## L ((pr122 (pr1 L)) x) • ((pr122 L) (L x)) ^-1)
 ▹ ηinv x) • (lunitor (ηinv x) • rinvunitor (ηinv x))

p:= pstrans_id ηinv x: (ηinv x ◃ psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor B) x)
• psnaturality_of ηinv (id₁ x) =

• (psfunctor_id
     (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) x
   ▹ ηinv x)

 ▹ ηinv x) • (lunitor (ηinv x) • rinvunitor (ηinv x))

p: id₂ (ηinv x · id₁ x)

   ▹ ηinv x)
is_invertible_2cell
  ((## L ((pr122 (pr1 L)) x) • ((pr122 L) (L x)) ^-1)

B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x: op2_bicat B
p: psnaturality_of ηinv (id₁ x) =
(runitor (ηinv x) • linvunitor (ηinv x))
• (((pr122 (pr1 L)) (L x) • ## L ((pr122 L) x) ^-1)
   ▹ ηinv x)
is_invertible_2cell (## L ((pr122 (pr1 L)) x))

        exact (psfunctor_is_iso L (weq_op2_invertible_2cell _ _ (psfunctor_id L x))).
      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x: op2_bicat B
p: psnaturality_of ηinv (id₁ x) =
(runitor (ηinv x) • linvunitor (ηinv x))
• (((pr122 (pr1 L)) (L x) • ## L ((pr122 L) x) ^-1)
   ▹ ηinv x)
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (ηinv x)
   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (psfunctor_is_iso L
         (weq_op2_invertible_2cell (# L (id₁ x))
            (id₁ (L x)) (psfunctor_id L x)))
      (is_invertible_2cell_inv ((pr122 L) (L x)))))
^-1 • (psnaturality_of ηinv (id₁ x)) ^-1 =
lunitor (ηinv x) • rinvunitor (ηinv x)

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x: op2_bicat B
p: psnaturality_of ηinv (id₁ x) =
(runitor (ηinv x) • linvunitor (ηinv x))
• (((pr122 (pr1 L)) (L x) • ## L ((pr122 L) x) ^-1)
   ▹ ηinv x)
((pr122 (pr1 L)) (L x) • ## L ((pr122 L) x) ^-1)
▹ ηinv x =
(lunitor (ηinv x) • rinvunitor (ηinv x))
• psnaturality_of ηinv (id₁ x)

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))

invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x: op2_bicat B
p: psnaturality_of ηinv (id₁ x) =
(runitor (ηinv x) • linvunitor (ηinv x))
• (((pr122 (pr1 L)) (L x) • ## L ((pr122 L) x) ^-1)
   ▹ ηinv x)
(runitor (ηinv x) • linvunitor (ηinv x))
• (((pr122 (pr1 L)) (L x) • ## L ((pr122 L) x) ^-1)
   ▹ ηinv x) = psnaturality_of ηinv (id₁ x)

      exact (!p).
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
∏ (X Y Z : op2_bicat B) (f : op2_bicat B ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(g : op2_bicat B ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 duality_counit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f g)
• pr2 duality_counit_data X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator (pr1 duality_counit_data X)
      (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f)
      (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) g)
    • (pr2 duality_counit_data X Y f
       ▹ # (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) g))
   • rassociator (# (comp_psfunctor R L) f)
       (pr1 duality_counit_data Y)
       (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) g))
  • (# (comp_psfunctor R L) f
     ◃ pr2 duality_counit_data Y Z g))
 • lassociator (# (comp_psfunctor R L) f)
     (# (comp_psfunctor R L) g)
     (pr1 duality_counit_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp (comp_psfunctor R L) f g
   ▹ pr1 duality_counit_data Z)
 
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))

invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
(psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g)) ^-1
• (ηinv x ◃ id₂ (f · g)) =
((## L ((pr222 (pr1 L)) x y z f g)
  • ((pr222 L) (L x) (L y) (L z) (# L f) (# L g)) ^-1)
 ▹ ηinv z)
• (rassociator (# L (# L f)) (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z)
   • ((# L (# L f) ◃ (psnaturality_of ηinv g) ^-1)
      • (lassociator (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g
         • (((psnaturality_of ηinv f) ^-1 ▹ g)
            • rassociator (ηinv x) f g))))

g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
id₂ (ηinv x · (f · g)) =

       ^-1) ▹ ηinv z)
   • (rassociator (# L (# L f)) (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z)

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L

  (id_psfunctor B)

invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
p:= pstrans_comp ηinv f g: (ηinv x ◃ psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor B) f g)
• psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g) =
((((lassociator (ηinv x) 
      (# (id_psfunctor B) f)
      (# (id_psfunctor B) g)
    • (psnaturality_of ηinv f
       ▹ # (id_psfunctor B) g))
   • rassociator
       (# (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) f)
       (ηinv y) (# (id_psfunctor B) g))
  • (# (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) f
     ◃ psnaturality_of ηinv g))
 • lassociator
     (# (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) f)
     (# (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) g)
     (ηinv z))
• (psfunctor_comp
     (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) f g
   ▹ ηinv z)
id₂ (ηinv x · (f · g)) =
psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g)
• (((## L ((pr222 (pr1 L)) x y z f g)
     • ((pr222 L) (L x) (L y) (L z) (# L f) (# L g))
       ^-1) ▹ ηinv z)
   • (rassociator (# L (# L f)) (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z)
      • ((# L (# L f) ◃ (psnaturality_of ηinv g) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g
            • (((psnaturality_of ηinv f) ^-1 ▹ g)
               • rassociator (ηinv x) f g)))))

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
p:= pstrans_comp ηinv f g: (ηinv x ◃ id₂ (f · g))
• psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g) =
((((lassociator (ηinv x) f g
    • (psnaturality_of ηinv f ▹ g))
   • rassociator (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g)
  • (# L (# L f) ◃ psnaturality_of ηinv g))
 • lassociator (# L (# L f)) 
     (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z))
• (((pr222 (pr1 L)) (L x) 
      (L y) (L z) (# L f) 
      (# L g) • ## L ((pr222 L) x y z f g) ^-1)
   ▹ ηinv z)
id₂ (ηinv x · (f · g)) =
psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g)
• (((## L ((pr222 (pr1 L)) x y z f g)
     • ((pr222 L) (L x) (L y) (L z) (# L f) (# L g))
       ^-1) ▹ ηinv z)
   • (rassociator (# L (# L f)) (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z)
      • ((# L (# L f) ◃ (psnaturality_of ηinv g) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g
            • (((psnaturality_of ηinv f) ^-1 ▹ g)
               • rassociator (ηinv x) f g)))))

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (id_psfunctor B)

  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
p: psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g) =
((((lassociator (ηinv x) f g
    • (psnaturality_of ηinv f ▹ g))
   • rassociator (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g)
  • (# L (# L f) ◃ psnaturality_of ηinv g))
 • lassociator (# L (# L f)) 
     (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z))
• (((pr222 (pr1 L)) (L x) 
      (L y) (L z) (# L f) 
      (# L g) • ## L ((pr222 L) x y z f g) ^-1)
   ▹ ηinv z)
id₂ (ηinv x · (f · g)) =
psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g)
• (((## L ((pr222 (pr1 L)) x y z f g)
     • ((pr222 L) (L x) (L y) (L z) (# L f) (# L g))
       ^-1) ▹ ηinv z)
   • (rassociator (# L (# L f)) (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z)
      • ((# L (# L f) ◃ (psnaturality_of ηinv g) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g
            • (((psnaturality_of ηinv f) ^-1 ▹ g)
               • rassociator (ηinv x) f g)))))

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
p: psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g) =
((((lassociator (ηinv x) f g
    • (psnaturality_of ηinv f ▹ g))
   • rassociator (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g)
  • (# L (# L f) ◃ psnaturality_of ηinv g))
 • lassociator (# L (# L f)) 
     (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z))
• (((pr222 (pr1 L)) (L x) 
      (L y) (L z) (# L f) 
      (# L g) • ## L ((pr222 L) x y z f g) ^-1)
   ▹ ηinv z)
is_invertible_2cell (## L ((pr222 (pr1 L)) x y z f g))
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
p: psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g) =
((((lassociator (ηinv x) f g
    • (psnaturality_of ηinv f ▹ g))
   • rassociator (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g)
  • (# L (# L f) ◃ psnaturality_of ηinv g))
 • lassociator (# L (# L f)) 
     (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z))
• (((pr222 (pr1 L)) (L x) 
      (L y) (L z) (# L f) 
      (# L g) • ## L ((pr222 L) x y z f g) ^-1)
   ▹ ηinv z)
id₂ (ηinv x · (f · g))
• (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker 
        (ηinv z)
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp 
           ?Goal0
           (is_invertible_2cell_inv
              ((pr222 L) 
                 (L x) (L y) 
                 (L z) (# L f) 
                 (# L g)))))
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator 
           (# L (# L f)) 
           (# L (# L g)) 
           (ηinv z))
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
              (# L (# L f))
              (is_invertible_2cell_inv
                 (psnaturality_of ηinv g)))
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                 (# L (# L f)) 
                 (ηinv y) g)
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
                    (is_invertible_2cell_inv
                       (psnaturality_of ηinv f)))
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                    (ηinv x) f g)))))) ^-1 =
psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g)

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
p: psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g) =
((((lassociator (ηinv x) f g
    • (psnaturality_of ηinv f ▹ g))
   • rassociator (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g)
  • (# L (# L f) ◃ psnaturality_of ηinv g))
 • lassociator (# L (# L f)) 
     (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z))
• (((pr222 (pr1 L)) (L x) 
      (L y) (L z) (# L f) 
      (# L g) • ## L ((pr222 L) x y z f g) ^-1)
   ▹ ηinv z)
is_invertible_2cell (## L ((pr222 (pr1 L)) x y z f g))

        exact (psfunctor_is_iso L (weq_op2_invertible_2cell _ _ (psfunctor_comp L f g))).
      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
p: psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g) =
((((lassociator (ηinv x) f g
    • (psnaturality_of ηinv f ▹ g))
   • rassociator (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g)
  • (# L (# L f) ◃ psnaturality_of ηinv g))
 • lassociator (# L (# L f)) 
     (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z))
• (((pr222 (pr1 L)) (L x) 
      (L y) (L z) (# L f) 
      (# L g) • ## L ((pr222 L) x y z f g) ^-1)
   ▹ ηinv z)
id₂ (ηinv x · (f · g))
• (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (ηinv z)
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (psfunctor_is_iso L
              (weq_op2_invertible_2cell (# L (f · g))
                 (# L f · # L g)
                 (psfunctor_comp L f g)))
           (is_invertible_2cell_inv
              ((pr222 L) (L x) (L y) (L z) (# L f)
                 (# L g)))))
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (# L (# L f))
           (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z))
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# L (# L f))
              (is_invertible_2cell_inv
                 (psnaturality_of ηinv g)))
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                 (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g)
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
                    (is_invertible_2cell_inv
                       (psnaturality_of ηinv f)))
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                    (ηinv x) f g)))))) ^-1 =
psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g)

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
p: psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g) =
((((lassociator (ηinv x) f g
    • (psnaturality_of ηinv f ▹ g))
   • rassociator (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g)
  • (# L (# L f) ◃ psnaturality_of ηinv g))
 • lassociator (# L (# L f)) 
     (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z))
• (((pr222 (pr1 L)) (L x) 
      (L y) (L z) (# L f) 
      (# L g) • ## L ((pr222 L) x y z f g) ^-1)
   ▹ ηinv z)
(is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (ηinv z)
      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (psfunctor_is_iso L
            (weq_op2_invertible_2cell (# L (f · g))
               (# L f · # L g) (psfunctor_comp L f g)))
         (is_invertible_2cell_inv
            ((pr222 L) (L x) (L y) (L z) (# L f)
               (# L g)))))
   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (# L (# L f))
         (# L (# L g)) (ηinv z))
      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# L (# L f))
            (is_invertible_2cell_inv
               (psnaturality_of ηinv g)))
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
               (# L (# L f)) (ηinv y) g)
            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
                  (is_invertible_2cell_inv
                     (psnaturality_of ηinv f)))
               (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                  (ηinv x) f g)))))) ^-1 =
psnaturality_of ηinv (f · g)

      exact (!p).
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))

invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
is_pstrans duality_counit_data
 exact duality_counit_is_pstrans.
  Defined.

  Let ε : pstrans
            (comp_psfunctor R L)
            (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
    := duality_counit.

  ((λ x : op2_bicat B,

   · # (comp_psfunctor R L) f)

   · (λ x : op2_bicat B,
      η x : op2_bicat B ⟦ x, L (L x) ⟧) Y)

  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell (f · η y) (η x · # L (# L f))

      exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell (psnaturality_of η f)).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
is_pstrans duality_counit_inv_data

 ◃ ## (comp_psfunctor R L) α)

 ◃ psfunctor_id (comp_psfunctor R L) X)

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L

∏ (X Y Z : op2_bicat B) (f : op2_bicat B ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(g : op2_bicat B ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 duality_counit_inv_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp (comp_psfunctor R L) f g)
• pr2 duality_counit_inv_data X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator (pr1 duality_counit_inv_data X)
      (# (comp_psfunctor R L) f)
      (# (comp_psfunctor R L) g)
    • (pr2 duality_counit_inv_data X Y f
       ▹ # (comp_psfunctor R L) g))
   • rassociator (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f)
       (pr1 duality_counit_inv_data Y)
       (# (comp_psfunctor R L) g))
  • (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f
     ◃ pr2 duality_counit_inv_data Y Z g))
 • lassociator (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f)
     (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) g)
     (pr1 duality_counit_inv_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f g
   ▹ pr1 duality_counit_inv_data Z)

 ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 L)) (L x) • ## L ((pr122 L) x) ^-1))
• psnaturality_of η (id₁ x) =
(runitor (η x) • linvunitor (η x))
• id₂ (id₁ x · η x)
(psnaturality_of η (id₁ x)) ^-1
• (η x
   ◃ (## L ((pr122 (pr1 L)) x) • ((pr122 L) (L x)) ^-1)) =
lunitor (η x) • rinvunitor (η x)

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
x: op2_bicat B
p: (η x
 ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 L)) (L x) • ## L ((pr122 L) x) ^-1))
• psnaturality_of η (id₁ x) =

(psnaturality_of η (id₁ x)) ^-1
• (η x
   ◃ (## L ((pr122 (pr1 L)) x) • ((pr122 L) (L x)) ^-1)) =
lunitor (η x) • rinvunitor (η x)

B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
∏ (X Y Z : op2_bicat B) (f : op2_bicat B ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(g : op2_bicat B ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 duality_counit_inv_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp (comp_psfunctor R L) f g)
• pr2 duality_counit_inv_data X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator (pr1 duality_counit_inv_data X)
      (# (comp_psfunctor R L) f)
      (# (comp_psfunctor R L) g)
    • (pr2 duality_counit_inv_data X Y f
       ▹ # (comp_psfunctor R L) g))
   • rassociator (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f)
       (pr1 duality_counit_inv_data Y)
       (# (comp_psfunctor R L) g))
  • (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f
     ◃ pr2 duality_counit_inv_data Y Z g))
 • lassociator (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f)
     (# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) g)
     (pr1 duality_counit_inv_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f g
   ▹ pr1 duality_counit_inv_data Z)

x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
(psnaturality_of η (f · g)) ^-1
• (η x
   ◃ (## L ((pr222 (pr1 L)) x y z f g)
      • ((pr222 L) (L x) (L y) (L z) (# L f) (# L g))
        ^-1)) =
(id₂ (f · g) ▹ η z)
• (rassociator f g (η z)
   • ((f ◃ (psnaturality_of η g) ^-1)
      • (lassociator f (η y) (# L (# L g))
         • (((psnaturality_of η f) ^-1 ▹ # L (# L g))
            • rassociator (η x) (# L (# L f))
                (# L (# L g))))))

  • (f ◃ psnaturality_of η g))

B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
p: (η x
 ◃ ((pr222 (pr1 L)) (L x) 
      (L y) (L z) (# L f) 
      (# L g) • ## L ((pr222 L) x y z f g) ^-1))
• psnaturality_of η (f · g) =
(((lassociator (η x) (# L (# L f)) (# L (# L g))
   • (psnaturality_of η f ▹ # L (# L g)))
  • rassociator f (η y) (# L (# L g)))
 • (f ◃ psnaturality_of η g))
• lassociator f g (η z)
(psnaturality_of η (f · g)) ^-1
• (η x
   ◃ (## L ((pr222 (pr1 L)) x y z f g)
      • ((pr222 L) (L x) (L y) (L z) (# L f) (# L g))
        ^-1)) =
rassociator f g (η z)
• ((f ◃ (psnaturality_of η g) ^-1)
   • (lassociator f (η y) (# L (# L g))
      • (((psnaturality_of η f) ^-1 ▹ # L (# L g))
         • rassociator (η x) (# L (# L f))
             (# L (# L g)))))

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (id_psfunctor B)

  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))

  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))

  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))

 ◃ ((pr222 (pr1 L)) (L x)

• psnaturality_of η (f · g) =
(((lassociator (η x) (# L (# L f)) (# L (# L g))
   • (psnaturality_of η f ▹ # L (# L g)))
  • rassociator f (η y) (# L (# L g)))
 • (f ◃ psnaturality_of η g))
• lassociator f g (η z)
η x
◃ (## L ((pr222 (pr1 L)) x y z f g)
   • ((pr222 L) (L x) (L y) (L z) (# L f) (# L g)) ^-1) =
psnaturality_of η (f · g)

invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))

  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
p: (η x
 ◃ ((pr222 (pr1 L)) (L x) 
      (L y) (L z) (# L f) 
      (# L g) • ## L ((pr222 L) x y z f g) ^-1))
• psnaturality_of η (f · g) =
(((lassociator (η x) (# L (# L f)) (# L (# L g))
   • (psnaturality_of η f ▹ # L (# L g)))
  • rassociator f (η y) (# L (# L g)))
 • (f ◃ psnaturality_of η g))
• lassociator f g (η z)
(η x
 ◃ (## L ((pr222 (pr1 L)) x y z f g)
    • ((pr222 L) (L x) (L y) (L z) (# L f) (# L g))

     • rassociator f (η y) (# L (# L g)))

   • lassociator f g (η z)) =
psnaturality_of η (f · g)

  (id_psfunctor B)

  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)

t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,

x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
p: (η x
 ◃ ((pr222 (pr1 L)) (L x) 
      (L y) (L z) (# L f) 
      (# L g) • ## L ((pr222 L) x y z f g) ^-1))
• psnaturality_of η (f · g) =
(((lassociator (η x) (# L (# L f)) (# L (# L g))
   • (psnaturality_of η f ▹ # L (# L g)))
  • rassociator f (η y) (# L (# L g)))
 • (f ◃ psnaturality_of η g))
• lassociator f g (η z)
is_invertible_2cell (## L ((pr222 (pr1 L)) x y z f g))

        exact (psfunctor_is_iso L (weq_op2_invertible_2cell _ _ (psfunctor_comp L f g))).
      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
x, y, z: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: op2_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧
p: (η x
 ◃ ((pr222 (pr1 L)) (L x) 
      (L y) (L z) (# L f) 
      (# L g) • ## L ((pr222 L) x y z f g) ^-1))
• psnaturality_of η (f · g) =
(((lassociator (η x) (# L (# L f)) (# L (# L g))
   • (psnaturality_of η f ▹ # L (# L g)))
  • rassociator f (η y) (# L (# L g)))
 • (f ◃ psnaturality_of η g))
• lassociator f g (η z)
(((lassociator (η x) (# L (# L f)) (# L (# L g))
   • (psnaturality_of η f ▹ # L (# L g)))
  • rassociator f (η y) (# L (# L g)))
 • (f ◃ psnaturality_of η g)) • lassociator f g (η z) =
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (η x)
   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (psfunctor_is_iso L
         (weq_op2_invertible_2cell (# L (f · g))
            (# L f · # L g) (psfunctor_comp L f g)))
      (is_invertible_2cell_inv
         ((pr222 L) (L x) (L y) (L z) (# L f) (# L g)))))
^-1 • psnaturality_of η (f · g)

      exact (!p).
  Qed.

  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))

invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)

is_pstrans duality_counit_inv_data
 exact duality_counit_inv_is_pstrans.
  Defined.

  Let εinv : pstrans
               (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
               (comp_psfunctor R L)
    := duality_counit_inv.

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
invertible_modification_data
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor R L)) (ε · εinv)

    exact (invertible_modcomponent_of ηinvη x).
  Defined.

d: duality_involution_data L

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (id_psfunctor B)

  (comp_psfunctor R L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
psnaturality_of (id₁ (comp_psfunctor R L)) f
• (# (comp_psfunctor R L) f
   ◃ duality_counit_counit_inv_data y) =
(duality_counit_counit_inv_data x
 ▹ # (comp_psfunctor R L) f)
• psnaturality_of (ε · εinv) f

◃ duality_counit_counit_inv_data y =
?Hε ^-1
• ((duality_counit_counit_inv_data x
    ▹ # (comp_psfunctor R L) f)
   • psnaturality_of (ε · εinv) f)

(# (comp_psfunctor R L) f
 ◃ duality_counit_counit_inv_data y)
• (psnaturality_of (ε · εinv) f) ^-1 =
(psnaturality_of (id₁ (comp_psfunctor R L)) f) ^-1
• (duality_counit_counit_inv_data x
   ▹ # (comp_psfunctor R L) f)

    exact (modnaturality_of (pr1 ηinvη) _ _ f).
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
invertible_modification (id₁ (comp_psfunctor R L))
  (ε · εinv)

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f
◃ duality_counit_inv_counit_data y =
((psnaturality_of (εinv · ε) f) ^-1
 • (duality_counit_inv_counit_data x
    ▹ # (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f))
• psnaturality_of (id₁ (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))) f

d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(psnaturality_of (εinv · ε) f) ^-1 = ?y'

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((rassociator (η x) (ηinv x) f
   • (η x ◃ psnaturality_of ηinv f))
  • lassociator (η x)
      ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor R L)) x y f) (ηinv y))
 • (psnaturality_of η f ▹ ηinv y))
• rassociator f (η y) (ηinv y) = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((rassociator (η x) (ηinv x) f
    • (η x ◃ psnaturality_of ηinv f))
   • lassociator (η x)
       ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor R L)) x y f) (ηinv y))
  • (psnaturality_of η f ▹ ηinv y))
 • rassociator f (η y) (ηinv y))
• (duality_counit_inv_counit_data x
   ▹ # (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f) =
(# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f
 ◃ duality_counit_inv_counit_data y)
• (lunitor f • rinvunitor f)

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= modnaturality_of (pr1 ηηinv) x y f: psnaturality_of (id₁ (id_psfunctor B)) f
• (# (id_psfunctor B) f ◃ pr1 ηηinv y) =
(pr1 ηηinv x ▹ # (id_psfunctor B) f)
• psnaturality_of
    (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d) f
((((rassociator (η x) (ηinv x) f
    • (η x ◃ psnaturality_of ηinv f))
   • lassociator (η x)
       ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor R L)) x y f) (ηinv y))
  • (psnaturality_of η f ▹ ηinv y))
 • rassociator f (η y) (ηinv y))
• (duality_counit_inv_counit_data x
   ▹ # (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f) =
(# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f
 ◃ duality_counit_inv_counit_data y)
• (lunitor f • rinvunitor f)

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= modnaturality_of (pr1 ηηinv) x y f: (lunitor f • rinvunitor f) • (f ◃ pr1 ηηinv y) =
(pr1 ηηinv x ▹ f)
• ((((rassociator ((pr111 (unit_of_duality d)) x)
        ((pr111 (unit_inv_of_duality d)) x) f
      • ((pr111 (unit_of_duality d)) x
         ◃ (pr211 (unit_inv_of_duality d)) x y f))
     • lassociator ((pr111 (unit_of_duality d)) x)
         ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor L
                    (op2_psfunctor L))) x y f)
         ((pr111 (unit_inv_of_duality d)) y))
    • ((pr211 (unit_of_duality d)) x y f
       ▹ (pr111 (unit_inv_of_duality d)) y))
   • rassociator f ((pr111 (unit_of_duality d)) y)
       ((pr111 (unit_inv_of_duality d)) y))
((((rassociator (η x) (ηinv x) f
    • (η x ◃ psnaturality_of ηinv f))
   • lassociator (η x)
       ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor R L)) x y f) (ηinv y))
  • (psnaturality_of η f ▹ ηinv y))
 • rassociator f (η y) (ηinv y))
• (duality_counit_inv_counit_data x
   ▹ # (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f) =
(# (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)) f
 ◃ duality_counit_inv_counit_data y)
• (lunitor f • rinvunitor f)

    exact (!p).
  Qed.

  Transparent comp_psfunctor.

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
invertible_modification (εinv · ε)
  (id₁ (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)))
