⟦ id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B), comp_psfunctor R L ⟧
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
id₁ (comp_psfunctor R L) ==> ε · ?pr1
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
(λ _ : id₁ (comp_psfunctor R L) ==> ε · ?pr1,
 ?pr1 · ε ==> id₁ (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))) 
  ?pr10
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))) 
  ?pr11

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
psfunctor_bicat (op2_bicat B) (op2_bicat B)
⟦ id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B), comp_psfunctor R L ⟧
 exact εinv.
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
id₁ (comp_psfunctor R L) ==> ε · εinv
 exact (pr1 duality_counit_counit_inv).
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
(λ _ : id₁ (comp_psfunctor R L) ==> ε · εinv,
 εinv · ε ==> id₁ (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B)))
  (pr1 duality_counit_counit_inv)
 exact (pr1 duality_counit_inv_counit).
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (εinv,,
      pr1 duality_counit_counit_inv,,
      pr1 duality_counit_inv_counit))
 exact (pr2 duality_counit_counit_inv).
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution_data L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
ε:= duality_counit: pstrans (comp_psfunctor R L)
  (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor R L)
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (εinv,,
             pr1 duality_counit_counit_inv,,
             pr1 duality_counit_inv_counit)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit
      (εinv,,
       pr1 duality_counit_counit_inv,,
       pr1 duality_counit_inv_counit)))
  (pr2 duality_counit_counit_inv)
 exact (pr2 duality_counit_inv_counit).
  Defined.

  Definition left_adjoint_equivalance_duality_counit
    : left_adjoint_equivalence ε
    := equiv_to_adjequiv
         ε
         left_equivalance_duality_counit.
End CounitFromDualityInvolution.

(** * 3. Laws of duality involutions *)
Section LawsDualityInvolution.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {L : psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B}
          (d : duality_involution_data L).

  Let R : psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
    := op2_psfunctor L.

  Let η := unit_of_duality d.
  Let ηinv := unit_inv_of_duality d.
  Let ηηinv := unit_unit_inv_of_duality d.
  Let ηinvη := unit_inv_unit_of_duality d.
  Let t := triangle_data_of_duality d.

  Definition duality_coherency_lhs
             (x : B)
    : η x · # L (# L (η x)) ==> η x · # L (η (L x))
    := psnaturality_of η (η x) • (η x ◃ t (L x)).

  Definition duality_coherency_rhs
             (x : B)
    : η x · # L (# L (η x)) ==> η x · # L (η (L x))
    := η x ◃ ##L (t x).

  Definition duality_coherency
    : UU
    := ∏ (x : B),
       duality_coherency_lhs x
       =
       duality_coherency_rhs x.

  Definition duality_triangle_law_lhs
             {x y : B}
             (f : x --> y)
    : η (L x) · #L(#L(#L f)) ==> #L(η x · #L(#L f))
    := (t x ▹ #L (#L (#L f)))
       • psfunctor_comp L (η x) (#L (#L f)).

  Definition duality_triangle_law_rhs
             {x y : B}
             (f : x --> y)
    : η (L x) · #L(#L(#L f)) ==> #L(η x · #L(#L f))
    := psnaturality_of η (# L f)
       • (#L f ◃ t y)
       • psfunctor_comp L f (η y)
       • ##L (psnaturality_of η f).

  Definition duality_triangle_law
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y : B)
         (f : x --> y),
       duality_triangle_law_lhs f = duality_triangle_law_rhs f.

  Definition duality_involution_laws
    : UU
    := duality_coherency
       ×
       duality_triangle_law.
End LawsDualityInvolution.

(** * 4. Duality involutions *)
Definition duality_involution
           {B : bicat}
           (L : psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B)
  : UU
  := ∑ (d : duality_involution_data L),
     duality_involution_laws d.

Coercion duality_involution_to_data
         {B : bicat}
         {L : psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B}
         (d : duality_involution L)
  : duality_involution_data L
  := pr1 d.

Definition duality_involution_to_laws
           {B : bicat}
           {L : psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B}
           (d : duality_involution L)
  : duality_involution_laws (duality_involution_to_data d)
  := pr2 d.

(** * 5. Accessors for the laws of duality involutions *)
Section Accessors.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {L : psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B}
          (d : duality_involution L).

  Let R : psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
    := op2_psfunctor L.

  Let η := unit_of_duality d.
  Let ηinv := unit_inv_of_duality d.
  Let ηηinv := unit_unit_inv_of_duality d.
  Let ηinvη := unit_inv_unit_of_duality d.
  Let t := triangle_data_of_duality d.

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
duality_coherency d

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
duality_coherency d

    exact (pr12 d).
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)) =
((psnaturality_of η (# L f) • (# L f ◃ t y))
 • psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
• ## L (psnaturality_of η f)

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)) =
((psnaturality_of η (# L f) • (# L f ◃ t y))
 • psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
• ## L (psnaturality_of η f)

    exact (pr22 d x y f).
  Qed.

  Let εinv := duality_counit_inv d.

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
invertible_modification_data
  (linvunitor_pstrans L · (η ▻ L))
  (rinvunitor_pstrans L · (L ◅ εinv)
   · lassociator_pstrans L (op2_psfunctor L) L)

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
invertible_modification_data
  (linvunitor_pstrans L · (η ▻ L))
  (rinvunitor_pstrans L · (L ◅ εinv)
   · lassociator_pstrans L (op2_psfunctor L) L)

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x: op2_bicat B
invertible_2cell (id₁ (L x) · η (L x))
  (id₁ (L x) · # L (unit_of_duality d x)
   · id₁ (L (L (L x))))

    exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (lunitor_invertible_2cell _)
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (t x)
                (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _)
                   (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell _)))).
  Defined.


  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))
      (# L (# L (# L f)))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f)))
   • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y)))
  • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f)) ▹ η (L y)))
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f
   ◃ (lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y))
      • (t y
         • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
            • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))))) =
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((((rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
         ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
            • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))))
     • lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
         (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
             (# L (# L (# L f)))
           • (id₁ (L x)
              ◃ ((psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))
                  • ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
                 • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
          • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
              (# L (η y)))
         • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f))
            ▹ # L (η y)))
        • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
       (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))
      (# L (# L (# L f)))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f)))
   • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y)))
  • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f)) ▹ η (L y)))
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f
   ◃ (lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y))
      • (t y
         • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
            • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))))) =
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((((rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
         ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
            • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))))
     • lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
         (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
             (# L (# L (# L f)))
           • (id₁ (L x)
              ◃ ((psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))
                  • ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
                 • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
          • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
              (# L (η y)))
         • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f))
            ▹ # L (η y)))
        • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
       (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x)) (# L (# L (# L f)))
• ((id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y))
      • (((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f))
          ▹ η (L y))
         • (rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y))
              (η (L y))
            • (# L f
               ◃ (lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y))
                  • (t y
                     • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
                        • rinvunitor
                            (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))))))))) =
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                         • rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ # L (η y))
                       • rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x)) (# L (# L (# L f)))
• ((id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y))
      • (((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f))
          ▹ η (L y))
         • (rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y))
              (η (L y))
            • (# L f
               ◃ (lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y))
                  • (t y
                     • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
                        • rinvunitor
                            (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) 
     (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) 
           (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator 
                (id₁ (L x)) 
                (# L (η x)) 
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L 
                       (η x) 
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • 
                        (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator 
                      (id₁ (L x)) 
                      (# L f) 
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                        • 
                        rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ 
                        # L (η y))
                       • 
                       rassociator 
                        (# L f) 
                        (id₁ (L y)) 
                        (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator 
                (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x)) (# L (# L (# L f)))
• ((id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y))
      • (((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f))
          ▹ η (L y))
         • (rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y))
              (η (L y))
            • (# L f
               ◃ (lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y))
                  • (t y
                     • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
                        • rinvunitor
                            (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x)) (# L (# L (# L f)))
• ((id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y))
      • (((lunitor (# L f) ▹ η (L y))
          • (rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ η (L y)))
         • (rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y))
              (η (L y))
            • (# L f
               ◃ (lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y))
                  • (t y
                     • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
                        • rinvunitor
                            (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))
       (# L (# L (# L f)))
     • (id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f)))
    • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y)))
   • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ η (L y)))
  • (rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ η (L y)))
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f
   ◃ (((lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y)) • t y)
       • linvunitor (# L (η y)))
      • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))
    (# L (# L (# L f)))
  • (id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f)))
 • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y)))
• (lunitor (# L f) ▹ η (L y)) = ?y'

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x)) (# L (# L (# L f)))
• ((id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y))
      • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ η (L y)))) = ?y'

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x)) (# L (# L (# L f)))
• ((id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f))
   • lunitor (# L f · η (L y))) = ?y'

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x)) (# L (# L (# L f)))
• (lunitor
     (η (L x)
      · # (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) (# L f))
   • psnaturality_of η (# L f)) = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))
     (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • (lunitor
        (η (L x)
         · # (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
             (# L f)) • psnaturality_of η (# L f)))
  • (rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ η (L y)))
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f
   ◃ (((lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y)) • t y)
       • linvunitor (# L (η y)))
      • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))) =
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                         • rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ # L (η y))
                       • rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))
     (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • (lunitor
        (η (L x)
         · # (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
             (# L f)) • psnaturality_of η (# L f)))
  • (rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ η (L y)))
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f
   ◃ (((lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y)) • t y)
       • linvunitor (# L (η y)))
      • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))) = ?b
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) 
     (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) 
           (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator 
                (id₁ (L x)) 
                (# L (η x)) 
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L 
                       (η x) 
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • 
                        (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator 
                      (id₁ (L x)) 
                      (# L f) 
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                        • 
                        rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ 
                        # L (η y))
                       • 
                       rassociator 
                        (# L f) 
                        (id₁ (L y)) 
                        (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator 
                (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))
     (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • (lunitor
        (η (L x)
         · # (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
             (# L f)) • psnaturality_of η (# L f)))
  • (rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ η (L y)))
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f
   ◃ (((lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y)) • t y)
       • linvunitor (# L (η y)))
      • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x)) (# L (# L (# L f)))
• (lunitor
     (η (L x)
      · # (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) (# L f))
   • (psnaturality_of η (# L f)
      • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ η (L y))
         • (rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y))
              (η (L y))
            • (# L f
               ◃ (lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y))
                  • (t y
                     • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
                        • rinvunitor
                            (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ η (L y))
• (rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y))
   • (# L f
      ◃ (lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y))
         • (t y
            • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
               • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))))))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification

  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ η (L y))
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f
   ◃ (((lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y)) • t y)
       • linvunitor (# L (η y)))
      • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(id₂ (η (L y)) ⋆⋆ rinvunitor (# L f)
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f
   ◃ (((lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y)) • t y)
       • linvunitor (# L (η y)))
      • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))) = ?t2

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

• (# L f
   ◃ (((lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y)) • t y)
       • linvunitor (# L (η y)))
      • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))) = ?t2

       • linvunitor (# L (η y)))

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
# L f
◃ (linvunitor (η (L y))
   • (((lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y)) • t y)
       • linvunitor (# L (η y)))
      • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))) = ?t2

      • lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y))) • t y)

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
# L f
◃ ((t y • linvunitor (# L (η y)))
   • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x)) (# L (# L (# L f)))
• (lunitor
     (η (L x)
      · # (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) (# L f))
   • (psnaturality_of η (# L f)
      • (# L f
         ◃ ((t y • linvunitor (# L (η y)))
            • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))))) =
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                         • rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ # L (η y))
                       • rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x)) (# L (# L (# L f)))
• (lunitor
     (η (L x)
      · # (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) (# L f))
   • (psnaturality_of η (# L f)
      • (# L f
         ◃ ((t y • linvunitor (# L (η y)))
            • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))))) =
?b
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) 
     (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) 
           (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator 
                (id₁ (L x)) 
                (# L (η x)) 
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L 
                       (η x) 
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • 
                        (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator 
                      (id₁ (L x)) 
                      (# L f) 
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                        • 
                        rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ 
                        # L (η y))
                       • 
                       rassociator 
                        (# L f) 
                        (id₁ (L y)) 
                        (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator 
                (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))

(((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(lunitor (η (L x))
 ▹ # (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) (# L f))
• (psnaturality_of η (# L f)
   • (# L f
      ◃ (t y
         • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
            • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))))) =
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)

                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))

                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                         • rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ # L (η y))
                       • rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))

  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))

      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))

         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))

              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))

                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                         • rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ # L (η y))
                       • rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))))) =
(lunitor (η (L x))
 ▹ # (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) (# L f))
• (psnaturality_of η (# L f)
   • (# L f
      ◃ (t y
         • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
            • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                         • rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ # L (η y))
                       • rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))))) = ?b
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
(lunitor (η (L x))
 ▹ # (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) (# L f))
• (psnaturality_of η (# L f)
   • (# L f
      ◃ (t y
         • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
            • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                         • rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ # L (η y))
                       • rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((lunitor (η (L x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
 • ((t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))))
    ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                         • rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ # L (η y))
                       • rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(lunitor (η (L x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (((t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))))
    ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
          ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
             • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
         • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
              (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                   (# L (# L (# L f)))
                 • ((id₁ (L x)
                     ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                          (# L (# L f))
                        • (## L (...) ^-1
                           • (psfunctor_comp L f ...)
                             ^-1)))
                    • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                         (# L (η y))
                       • (((lunitor ...
                            • rinvunitor ...)
                           ▹ # L (η y))
                          • rassociator (# L f)
                              (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
                ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
               • rassociator (# L f)
                   (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                   (id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))) = ?b

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(lunitor (η (L x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (((t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))))
    ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
          ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
             • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
         • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
              (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                   (# L (# L (# L f)))
                 • ((id₁ (L x)
                     ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                          (# L (# L f))
                        • (## L (...) ^-1
                           • (psfunctor_comp L f ...)
                             ^-1)))
                    • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                         (# L (η y))
                       • (((lunitor ...
                            • rinvunitor ...)
                           ▹ # L (η y))
                          • rassociator (# L f)
                              (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
                ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
               • rassociator (# L f)
                   (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                   (id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))) =
(lunitor (η (L x))
 ▹ # (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) (# L f))
• (psnaturality_of η (# L f)
   • (# L f
      ◃ (t y
         • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
            • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)

  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))

invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((t x
  • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
     • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))

                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                         • rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ # L (η y))
                       • rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))))) =
psnaturality_of η (# L f)
• (# L f
   ◃ (t y
      • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
         • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))))
