  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((t x
  • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
     • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                         • rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ # L (η y))
                       • rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
 • ((linvunitor (# L (η x))
     • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))
    ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                         • rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ # L (η y))
                       • rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (((linvunitor (# L (η x))
     • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))
    ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
          ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
             • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
         • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
              (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                   (# L (# L (# L f)))
                 • ((id₁ (L x)
                     ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                          (# L (# L f))
                        • (## L (...) ^-1
                           • (psfunctor_comp L f ...)
                             ^-1)))
                    • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                         (# L (η y))
                       • (((lunitor ...
                            • rinvunitor ...)
                           ▹ # L (η y))
                          • rassociator (# L f)
                              (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
                ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
               • rassociator (# L f)
                   (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                   (id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((linvunitor (# L (η x))
  • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              • ((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1)))
                 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y))
                    • (((lunitor (# L f)
                         • rinvunitor (# L f))
                        ▹ # L (η y))
                       • rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))))))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
 • (rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
    ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
          • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
             • (((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f))
                     • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
                        • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1))) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                • ((lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y)) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                   • ((((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                        ▹ id₁ (L (L ...)))
                       • ((rinvunitor (# L f)
                           ▹ # L (η y))
                          ▹ id₁ (L (L ...))))
                      • (rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
                         ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
 • (rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
    ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
     (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • (((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
        ◃ lunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))
       • (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
          ◃ rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                (# L (# L (# L f)))
              ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
             • ((((id₁ (L x)
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                       (# L (# L f)))
                  • ((id₁ (L x)
                      ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
                     • (id₁ (L x)
                        ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                          ^-1))) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                • ((lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                      (# L (η y)) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                   • ((((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                        ▹ id₁ (L (L ...)))
                       • ((rinvunitor (# L f)
                           ▹ # L (η y))
                          ▹ id₁ (L (L ...))))
                      • (rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
                         ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))
            • rassociator (# L f)
                (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
    ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
          ◃ lunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))
         • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
             ◃ rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))
            • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
                 (# L (# L (# L f)))
                 (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
               • ((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                     (# L (# L (# L f)))
                   ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                  • ((((id₁ (L x)
                        ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                            (# L (# L f)))
                       • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (...) ^-1)
                          • (id₁ (L x)
                             ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f ...)
                               ^-1)))
                      ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                     • ((lassociator (id₁ (L x))
                           (# L f) (# L (η y))
                         ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                        • (((lunitor (# L f)
                             ▹ # L (η y))
                            ▹ id₁ (L (L ...)))
                           • (((rinvunitor ...
                                ▹ # L ...)
                               ▹ id₁ (L ...))
                              • ((rassociator ... ...
                                    ... ▹ id₁ ...)
                                 • rassociator (# L f)
                                     (... · ...)
                                     (id₁ ...)))))))))))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
    ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
          ◃ lunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))
         • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
             ◃ rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))
            • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
                 (# L (# L (# L f)))
                 (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
               • ((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                     (# L (# L (# L f)))
                   ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                  • ((((id₁ (L x)
                        ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                            (# L (# L f)))
                       • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (...) ^-1)
                          • (id₁ (L x)
                             ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f ...)
                               ^-1)))
                      ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                     • ((lassociator (id₁ (L x))
                           (# L f) (# L (η y))
                         ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                        • (((lunitor (# L f)
                             ▹ # L (η y))
                            ▹ id₁ (L (L ...)))
                           • (((rinvunitor ...
                                ▹ # L ...)
                               ▹ id₁ (L ...))
                              • ((rassociator ... ...
                                    ... ▹ id₁ ...)
                                 • rassociator (# L f)
                                     (... · ...)
                                     (id₁ ...)))))))))))) =
?b

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b = ?t2

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
    ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
          ◃ lunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))
         • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
             ◃ rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))
            • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
                 (# L (# L (# L f)))
                 (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
               • ((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                     (# L (# L (# L f)))
                   ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                  • ((((id₁ (L x)
                        ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                            (# L (# L f)))
                       • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (...) ^-1)
                          • (id₁ (L x)
                             ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f ...)
                               ^-1)))
                      ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                     • ((lassociator (id₁ (L x))
                           (# L f) (# L (η y))
                         ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                        • (((lunitor (# L f)
                             ▹ # L (η y))
                            ▹ id₁ (L (L ...)))
                           • (((rinvunitor ...
                                ▹ # L ...)
                               ▹ id₁ (L ...))
                              • ((rassociator ... ...
                                    ... ▹ id₁ ...)
                                 • rassociator (# L f)
                                     (... · ...)
                                     (id₁ ...)))))))))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
  (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
• ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
    ◃ lunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))
   • ((id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
       ◃ rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • ((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
               (# L (# L (# L f))) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • ((((id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x)
                      (# L (# L f)))
                 • ((id₁ (L x)
                     ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
                    • (id₁ (L x)
                       ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y))
                         ^-1))) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
               • ((lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                     (# L (η y)) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                  • (((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                      ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                     • (((rinvunitor (# L f)
                          ▹ # L (η y))
                         ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                        • ((rassociator (# L f)
                              (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
                            ▹ id₁ (L (L ...)))
                           • rassociator (# L f)
                               (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                               (id₁ (L (L ...)))))))))))) =
?t20

        
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((((((((rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (id₁ (L (L ...))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
         • (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
            ◃ lunitor (# L (# L ...))))
        • (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
           ◃ rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
       • lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
      • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
     • ((((id₁ (L x)
           ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
          • (id₁ (L x)
             ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
         • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
        ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
      ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
  • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
     ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
 • (rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
    ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
• rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
    (id₁ (L (L (L y)))) = ?t20

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B

invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((((((((runitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
         ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
        • (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
           ◃ rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
       • lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
      • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
     • ((((id₁ (L x)
           ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
          • (id₁ (L x)
             ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
         • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
        ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
      ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
  • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
     ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
 • (rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
    ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
• rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
    (id₁ (L (L (L y)))) = ?t20

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
    ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((((((((((runitor (... · ...) ▹ # L (# L ...))
              • (id₁ (...) · # L (...)
                 ◃ rinvunitor (# L ...)))
             • lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
                 (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L ...))))
            • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
                 (# L (# L (# L f)))
               ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
           • ((((id₁ (L x)
                 ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L ...))
                • (id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (...) ^-1))
               • (id₁ (L x)
                  ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
              ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
          • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
               (# L (η y)) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
         • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
            ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
        • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
           ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
       • (rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
          ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
      • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
          (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))) = ?t2

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
    ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((((((((((runitor (... · ...) ▹ # L (# L ...))
              • (id₁ (...) · # L (...)
                 ◃ rinvunitor (# L ...)))
             • lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))

            • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))

           • ((((id₁ (L x)
                 ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L ...))

            ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))

          ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
      • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((((((((((runitor (id₁ (...) · # L (...))
            ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
           • (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
              ◃ rinvunitor (# L (# L ...))))
          • lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
              (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
         • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))

        • ((((id₁ (L x)
              ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
             • (id₁ (L x)
                ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
            • (id₁ (L x)
               ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
           ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
       • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
          ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
      • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
         ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
     • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
        ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
       (id₁ (L (L (L y))))) = ?t20

B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((((((((rinvunitor (id₁ (...) · # L (...))
          • runitor (id₁ (...) · # L (...)))
         ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
        • (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
           ◃ rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
       • lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
      • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
     • ((((id₁ (L x)
           ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
          • (id₁ (L x)
             ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
         • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
        ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
      ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
  • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
     ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
 • (rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
    ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
• rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
    (id₁ (L (L (L y)))) = ?t20

        
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((((((((id₂ (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
         ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
        • (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
           ◃ rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))))
       • lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
      • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
     • ((((id₁ (L x)
           ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
          • (id₁ (L x)
             ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
         • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
        ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
      ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
  • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
     ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
 • (rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
    ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
• rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
    (id₁ (L (L (L y)))) = ?t20

    (id₁ (L (L (L y)))) = ?t20

• id₂ (id₁ (L (L (L y))))

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
  (# L (# L (# L f)))
• rinvunitor
    (id₁ (L x) · (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f)))) =
?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (((((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f)))
         • rinvunitor
             (id₁ (L x)
              · (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f)))))
        • ((((id₁ (L x)
              ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
             • (id₁ (L x)
                ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
            • (id₁ (L x)
               ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
           ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
       • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
          ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
      • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
         ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
     • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
        ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
       (id₁ (L (L (L y))))) = ?t2

            • (id₁ (L x)

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
     (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rinvunitor
        (id₁ (L x) · (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f))))
      • ((((id₁ (L x)
            ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
           • ((id₁ (L x)
               ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
              • (id₁ (L x)
                 ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
          ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • ((lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
               (# L (η y)) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • (((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
               • (((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                   ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                  • ((rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y))
                        (# L (η y))
                      ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
                     • rassociator (# L f)
                         (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                         (id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rinvunitor
  (id₁ (L x) · (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f))))
• ((((id₁ (L x) ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
     • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
        • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
    ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
   • ((lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
      • (((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
          ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • ((rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y))
                  (# L (η y)) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
               • rassociator (# L f)
                   (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                   (id₁ (L (L (L y))))))))) = ?t20

        
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((((rinvunitor
       (id₁ (L x) · (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f))))
     • ((((id₁ (L x)
           ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
          • (id₁ (L x)
             ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
         • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
        ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
      ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
  • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
     ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
 • (rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
    ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
• rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
    (id₁ (L (L (L y)))) = ?t20

        
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((rinvunitor
      (id₁ (L x) · (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f))))
    • ((((id₁ (L x)
          ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
         • (id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
        • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
      ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
  • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
 • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
    ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
• (rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
   ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))) = ?y'

        
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rinvunitor
  (id₁ (L x) · (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f))))
• ((((id₁ (L x) ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
     • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
        • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
    ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
   • ((lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
      • (((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
          ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
         • (((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
             ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y))))
            • (rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y))
                 (# L (η y)) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))))) =
?y'

        
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rinvunitor
  (id₁ (L x) · (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f))))
• ((((id₁ (L x) ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
     • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
        • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
    • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
       • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
          • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
             • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y))
                 (# L (η y)))))) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))) =
?y'

        
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
rinvunitor
  (id₁ (L x) · (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f))))
• id₂ (id₁ (L (L (L y))))
  ⋆⋆ (((id₁ (L x)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
       • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
          • (id₁ (L x)
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
         • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
            • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
               • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y))
                   (# L (η y)))))) = ?y'

        
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((id₁ (L x) ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
  • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
     • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
 • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
    • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
       • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
          • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y))
              (# L (η y))))))
• rinvunitor (# L f · (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))) = ?y'

        
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(id₁ (L x) ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
• ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
   • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)
      • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y))
         • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
            • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
               • (rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y))
                    (# L (η y))
                  • rinvunitor
                      (# L f · (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))))))))) =
?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
     (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • (((id₁ (L x)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
       • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
          • ((id₁ (L x)
              ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)
             • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                  (# L (η y))
                • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                   • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                      • (rassociator (# L f)
                           (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
                         • rinvunitor
                             (# L f
                              · (id₁ (...) · # L (...))))))))))
      • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
          (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
     (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x)
       ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
         • ((id₁ (L x)
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)
            • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                 (# L (η y))
               • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                  • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                     • (rassociator (# L f)
                          (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
                        • (rinvunitor
                             (# L f
                              · (id₁ (...) · # L (...)))
                           • rassociator (# L f)
                               (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
                               (id₁ (L (L ...)))))))))))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
     (# L (# L (# L f)))
   • ((id₁ (L x)
       ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
         • ((id₁ (L x)
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)
            • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                 (# L (η y))
               • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                  • ((rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                     • (rassociator (# L f)
                          (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
                        • (# L f
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))))))))))) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
        (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x)
          ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
         • ((id₁ (L x)
             ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
            • ((id₁ (L x)
                ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)
               • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                    (# L (η y))
                  • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                     • ((rinvunitor (# L f)
                         ▹ # L (η y))
                        • (rassociator (# L f)
                             (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y))
                           • (# L f
                              ◃ rinvunitor
                                  (id₁ (...)
                                   · # L (...)))))))))))) =
psnaturality_of η (# L f)
• (# L f
   ◃ (t y
      • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
         • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((((((((t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
         • (linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
        • rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
            (# L (# L (# L f))))
       • (id₁ (L x)
          ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))))
      • (id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
     • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
    • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y)))
   • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
  • (rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
 • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)))
• (# L f ◃ rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))) =
psnaturality_of η (# L f)
• (# L f
   ◃ ((t y • linvunitor (# L (η y)))
      • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((((((((t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
         • (linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
        • rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
            (# L (# L (# L f))))
       • (id₁ (L x)
          ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))))
      • (id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
     • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
    • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y)))
   • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
  • (rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
 • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)))
• (# L f ◃ rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))) =
psnaturality_of η (# L f)
• ((# L f ◃ (t y • linvunitor (# L (η y))))
   • (# L f ◃ rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((((((((t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
         • (linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
        • rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
            (# L (# L (# L f))))
       • (id₁ (L x)
          ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))))
      • (id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
     • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
    • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y)))
   • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
  • (rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
 • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)))
• (# L f ◃ rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))) =
(psnaturality_of η (# L f)
 • (# L f ◃ (t y • linvunitor (# L (η y)))))
• (# L f ◃ rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((((((((t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
        • (linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
       • rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))))
      • (id₁ (L x)
         ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))))
     • (id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
   • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y)))
  • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
 • (rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
• rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)) =
psnaturality_of η (# L f)
• (# L f ◃ (t y • linvunitor (# L (η y))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((((((((t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
        • (linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
       • rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
           (# L (# L (# L f))))
      • (id₁ (L x)
         ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))))
     • (id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
   • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y)))
  • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
 • (rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
• rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)) = ?b
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
psnaturality_of η (# L f)
• (# L f ◃ (t y • linvunitor (# L (η y))))

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((((((((t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
        • (linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
       • rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))

      • (id₁ (L x)
         ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))))
     • (id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
   • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y)))
  • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
 • (rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
• rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)) = ?b

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
        (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x)
          ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
         • ((id₁ (L x)
             ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
            • ((id₁ (L x)
                ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)
               • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                    (# L (η y))
                  • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                     • ((rinvunitor (# L f)
                         ▹ # L (η y))
                        • rassociator (# L f)
                            (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(rinvunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
• rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)) = ?t2

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
id₂ (# L (η y)) ⋆⋆ rinvunitor (# L f)
• rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)) = ?t2

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
linvunitor (# L (η y)) ⋆⋆ id₂ (# L f) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
# L f ◃ linvunitor (# L (η y)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
        (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x)
          ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
         • ((id₁ (L x)
             ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
            • ((id₁ (L x)
                ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)
               • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                    (# L (η y))
                  • ((lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y))
                     • (# L f ◃ linvunitor (# L (η y)))))))))) =
psnaturality_of η (# L f)
• (# L f ◃ (t y • linvunitor (# L (η y))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((((((t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
       • (linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
      • rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
          (# L (# L (# L f))))
     • (id₁ (L x)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
   • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
  • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y)))
 • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
• (# L f ◃ linvunitor (# L (η y))) =
psnaturality_of η (# L f)
• (# L f ◃ (t y • linvunitor (# L (η y))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((((((t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
       • (linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
      • rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
          (# L (# L (# L f))))
     • (id₁ (L x)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
   • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
  • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y)))
 • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
• (# L f ◃ linvunitor (# L (η y))) =
psnaturality_of η (# L f)
• ((# L f ◃ t y) • (# L f ◃ linvunitor (# L (η y))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (id_psfunctor B)

  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((((((t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
       • (linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f))))
      • rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
          (# L (# L (# L f))))
     • (id₁ (L x)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
   • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
  • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y)))
 • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))
• (# L f ◃ linvunitor (# L (η y))) =
(psnaturality_of η (# L f) • (# L f ◃ t y))
• (# L f ◃ linvunitor (# L (η y)))

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

         (# L (# L (# L f))))

  • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
 • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (# L (η y)))
• (lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)) =
psnaturality_of η (# L f) • (# L f ◃ t y)

  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))

invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
        (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x)
          ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
         • ((id₁ (L x)
             ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
            • ((id₁ (L x)

               • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                    (# L (η y))
                  • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))))))) =
?b

d: duality_involution L

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (id_psfunctor B)

  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b = psnaturality_of η (# L f) • (# L f ◃ t y)

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
        (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x)
          ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
         • ((id₁ (L x)
             ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
            • ((id₁ (L x)
                ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)
               • (lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
                    (# L (η y))
                  • (lunitor (# L f) ▹ # L (η y)))))))) =

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
        (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • ((id₁ (L x)
          ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
         • ((id₁ (L x)
             ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
            • ((id₁ (L x)
                ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)
               • lunitor (# L f · # L (η y))))))) = 
?b

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))

invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(id₁ (L x) ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
• ((id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
   • ((id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)
      • lunitor (# L f · # L (η y)))) = ?t2

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(((id₁ (L x) ◃ psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
  • (id₁ (L x) ◃ ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1))
 • (id₁ (L x) ◃ (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
• lunitor (# L f · # L (η y)) = ?t2

d: duality_involution L

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(id₁ (L x)
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))
     • ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
    • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))
• lunitor (# L f · # L (η y)) = ?t2

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
lunitor (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))
    • ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
   • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
lunitor (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f)))
• (psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))
   • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
      • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
        (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • (lunitor (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f)))
         • (psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))
            • (## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1
               • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1))))) =
psnaturality_of η (# L f) • (# L f ◃ t y)

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(linvunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (lunitor (# L (η x)) ▹ # L (# L (# L f))) = ?y'

B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (id_psfunctor B)

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• (((id₂ (# L (η x) · # L (# L (# L f)))
     • psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)))
    • ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
   • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1) =
psnaturality_of η (# L f) • (# L f ◃ t y)
