B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (pr1 (psnaturality_of η f))

      apply (inv_of_invertible_2cell (psnaturality_of (unit_of_duality d) f)).
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
(t x ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f)) =
((psnaturality_of η (# L f) • (# L f ◃ t y))
 • (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)))
   ^-1)
• (psfunctor_is_iso L
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (to_op2_is_invertible_2cell
           (let X :=
              pr2
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                   (psnaturality_of
                      (unit_of_duality d) f)) in
            X)))) ^-1

    exact (duality_to_triangle_law f).
  Qed.

  Unset Kernel Term Sharing.

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
is_modification duality_triangle_modification_data

L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L

  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))

  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))

invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))

  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)

B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)

  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
psnaturality_of (linvunitor_pstrans L · (η ▻ L)) f
• (# L f ◃ duality_triangle_modification_data y) =
(duality_triangle_modification_data x
 ▹ # (comp_psfunctor
        (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)) L) f)
• psnaturality_of
    (rinvunitor_pstrans L · (L ◅ εinv)
     · lassociator_pstrans L (op2_psfunctor L) L) f

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))
      (# L (# L (# L f)))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f)))
   • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y)))
  • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f)) ▹ η (L y)))
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f ◃ duality_triangle_modification_data y) =
(duality_triangle_modification_data x
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((((rassociator
        (((λ X : B, id₁ (L X))
          · (λ X : B, # L (εinv X))) x)
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • (((λ X : B, id₁ (L X))
          · (λ X : B, # L (εinv X))) x
         ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
            • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))))
     • lassociator
         (((λ X : B, id₁ (L X))
           · (λ X : B, # L (εinv X))) x)
         (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (εinv x))
             (# L (# L (# L f)))
           • (id₁ (L x)
              ◃ (((pr222 (pr1 L)) x (L (L x))
                    (L (L y)) (εinv x) (# L (# L f))
                  • ## L (psnaturality_of (...) f) ^-1)
                 • ((pr222 L) x y (L (L y)) f (εinv y))
                   ^-1)))
          • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
              (# L (εinv y)))
         • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f))
            ▹ # L (εinv y)))
        • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y))
            (# L (εinv y))) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f)
       (((λ X : B, id₁ (L X))
         · (λ X : B, # L (εinv X))) y)
       (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))
      (# L (# L (# L f)))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f)))
   • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y)))
  • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f)) ▹ η (L y)))
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f ◃ duality_triangle_modification_data y) =
((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))
      (# L (# L (# L f)))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f)))
   • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y)))
  • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f)) ▹ η (L y)))
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f
   ◃ (lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y))
      • (t y
         • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
            • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))))))
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((((rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) 
        (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
         ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
            • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))))
     • lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
         (# L (# L (# L f))) 
         (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) 
             (# L (η x)) 
             (# L (# L (# L f)))
           • (id₁ (L x)
              ◃ ((psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))
                  • ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
                 • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
          • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) 
              (# L f) (# L (η y)))
         • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f))
            ▹ # L (η y)))
        • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • rassociator (# L f) 
       (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y)) 
       (id₁ (L (L (L y))))) =
(duality_triangle_modification_data x
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((((rassociator
        (((λ X : B, id₁ (L X))
          · (λ X : B, # L (εinv X))) x)
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) 
        (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • (((λ X : B, id₁ (L X))
          · (λ X : B, # L (εinv X))) x
         ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
            • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))))
     • lassociator
         (((λ X : B, id₁ (L X))
           · (λ X : B, # L (εinv X))) x)
         (# L (# L (# L f))) 
         (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) 
             (# L (εinv x)) 
             (# L (# L (# L f)))
           • (id₁ (L x)
              ◃ (((pr222 (pr1 L)) x 
                    (L (L x)) 
                    (L (L y)) 
                    (εinv x) 
                    (# L (# L f))
                  • ## L (psnaturality_of (...) f) ^-1)
                 • ((pr222 L) x y (L (L y)) f (εinv y))
                   ^-1)))
          • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) 
              (# L f) (# L (εinv y)))
         • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f))
            ▹ # L (εinv y)))
        • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) 
            (id₁ (L y)) (# L (εinv y)))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f)
       (((λ X : B, id₁ (L X))
         · (λ X : B, # L (εinv X))) y)
       (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))
      (# L (# L (# L f)))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f)))
   • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y)))
  • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f)) ▹ η (L y)))
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f ◃ duality_triangle_modification_data y) =
((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (η (L x))
      (# L (# L (# L f)))
    • (id₁ (L x) ◃ psnaturality_of η (# L f)))
   • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f) (η (L y)))
  • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f)) ▹ η (L y)))
 • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y)) (η (L y)))
• (# L f
   ◃ (lunitor (unit_of_duality d (L y))
      • (t y
         • (linvunitor (# L (η y))
            • rinvunitor (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))))))
 apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
x, y: op2_bicat B
f: op2_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧
((lunitor (η (L x))
  • (t x
     • (linvunitor (# L (η x))
        • rinvunitor (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)))))
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((((rassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x)
         ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
            • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))))
     • lassociator (id₁ (L x) · # L (η x))
         (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (η x))
             (# L (# L (# L f)))
           • (id₁ (L x)
              ◃ ((psfunctor_comp L (η x) (# L (# L f))
                  • ## L (psnaturality_of η f) ^-1)
                 • (psfunctor_comp L f (η y)) ^-1)))
          • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
              (# L (η y)))
         • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f))
            ▹ # L (η y)))
        • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y)) (# L (η y)))
       ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • rassociator (# L f) (id₁ (L y) · # L (η y))
       (id₁ (L (L (L y))))) =
(duality_triangle_modification_data x
 ▹ # L (# L (# L f)))
• ((((rassociator
        (((λ X : B, id₁ (L X))
          · (λ X : B, # L (εinv X))) x)
        (id₁ (L (L (L x)))) (# L (# L (# L f)))
      • (((λ X : B, id₁ (L X))
          · (λ X : B, # L (εinv X))) x
         ◃ (lunitor (# L (# L (# L f)))
            • rinvunitor (# L (# L (# L f))))))
     • lassociator
         (((λ X : B, id₁ (L X))
           · (λ X : B, # L (εinv X))) x)
         (# L (# L (# L f))) (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
    • (((((rassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L (εinv x))
             (# L (# L (# L f)))
           • (id₁ (L x)
              ◃ (((pr222 (pr1 L)) x (L (L x))
                    (L (L y)) (εinv x) (# L (# L f))
                  • ## L (psnaturality_of (...) f) ^-1)
                 • ((pr222 L) x y (L (L y)) f (εinv y))
                   ^-1)))
          • lassociator (id₁ (L x)) (# L f)
              (# L (εinv y)))
         • ((lunitor (# L f) • rinvunitor (# L f))
            ▹ # L (εinv y)))
        • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f) (id₁ (L y))
            (# L (εinv y))) ▹ id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
   • rassociator ((pr211 L) x y f)
       (((λ X : B, id₁ (L X))
         · (λ X : B, # L (εinv X))) y)
       (id₁ (L (L (L y)))))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
invertible_modification
  (linvunitor_pstrans L · (η ▻ L))
  (rinvunitor_pstrans L · (L ◅ εinv)
   · lassociator_pstrans L (op2_psfunctor L) L)

  
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
invertible_modification
  (linvunitor_pstrans L · (η ▻ L))
  (rinvunitor_pstrans L · (L ◅ εinv)
   · lassociator_pstrans L (op2_psfunctor L) L)

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
invertible_modification_data
  (linvunitor_pstrans L · (η ▻ L))
  (rinvunitor_pstrans L · (L ◅ εinv)
   · lassociator_pstrans L (op2_psfunctor L) L)
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
is_modification ?m

    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
invertible_modification_data
  (linvunitor_pstrans L · (η ▻ L))
  (rinvunitor_pstrans L · (L ◅ εinv)
   · lassociator_pstrans L (op2_psfunctor L) L)
 exact duality_triangle_modification_data.
    
B: bicat
L: psfunctor (op2_bicat B) B
d: duality_involution L
R:= op2_psfunctor L: psfunctor B (op2_bicat B)
η:= unit_of_duality d: pstrans (id_psfunctor B)
  (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
ηinv:= unit_inv_of_duality d: pstrans (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L))
  (id_psfunctor B)
ηηinv:= unit_unit_inv_of_duality d: invertible_modification (id₁ (id_psfunctor B))
  (unit_of_duality d · unit_inv_of_duality d)
ηinvη:= unit_inv_unit_of_duality d: invertible_modification
  (unit_inv_of_duality d · unit_of_duality d)
  (id₁ (comp_psfunctor L (op2_psfunctor L)))
t:= triangle_data_of_duality d: ∏ x : op2_bicat B,
invertible_2cell (unit_of_duality d (L x))
  (# L (unit_of_duality d x))
εinv:= duality_counit_inv d: pstrans (id_psfunctor (op2_bicat B))
  (comp_psfunctor (op2_psfunctor L) L)
is_modification duality_triangle_modification_data
 exact is_modification_duality_triangle.
  Defined.
End Accessors.
